changes.reason: Charm-wall breakaway is high-PnL but slow/heat-heavy: 5 trades, $985.6 PnL, 4.21 exposure hours, 50.5 minute average hold, and -346.8 worst MAE. Compressing the max target from 12 to the grid value 10 tests whether the profile can keep most convexity while reducing time-in-market.

Current multiplier 1.25 is the top grid value and may be extending holds in a no-stop system. Moving to 1.15 is a modest de-risking step that should harvest breakaway trades earlier without collapsing the profile to scalp-sized exits.

Keep the breakaway entry box from accepting very extended chases while preserving the observed representative high-MFE trade around 13.2 ES-VWAP distance. The 22 grid value is a mild tightening from 25 and avoids broad/global VWAP pruning.

expected_effect: This should reduce charm_wall_breakaway_long exposure duration and tail heat while retaining most of its high average PnL. Tradeoff: the profile may give up some large convex winners; reject if total net profit falls below 98% of run_001 or if profile PnL/exposure drops below roughly 200.
label: charm-wall-exit-compression
rationale: Use batch_d_charm_wall_breakaway_long, but change mechanism from the prior failed structure gate. The current leader is already a local optimum, and broad pruning is destructive. Charm-wall breakaway is small-sample but unusually profitable, with high MFE and no slow >=12h trades; the risk-adjusted experiment is to compress its exit/extension envelope rather than tighten higher-high/higher-low structure again.

strategy_hypotheses.evidence: charm_wall_breakaway_long has only 5 VALID_0DTE trades but contributes $985.6, 234.36 PnL/exposure hour, median MFE 146.2, and no slow trades. Its average hold is 50.5 minutes and worst MAE is -346.8, so exit distance rather than entry structure is the cleaner risk lever.
strategy_hypotheses.name: Charm Wall Breakaway Exit Compression
strategy_hypotheses.risk: Small sample; reducing target distance or multiplier can cut the profile's convex payoff and lower total net profit even if exposure improves.
strategy_hypotheses.trigger: VALID_0DTE charm-wall breakaway entries above the charm wall with confirmed breakout context but extended target distances.
strategy_hypotheses.validation_metric: Profile PnL/exposure stays above 200, total net profit remains at least 98% of run_001, completed trades decline by no more than 3, and average hold or average MAE improves without worsening worst MAE.

strategy_plan_reference.market_regime_read: The current leader is a strong long-only, positive-exit regime: 107 trades, $7125.8 net PnL, 100% realized win rate, 0.4% drawdown, no slow >=12h trades, and 36.17 exposure hour...

new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: Combined 1DTE PnL >= current $1305, 1DTE average MAE improves versus -123.86, and total PnL remains >=98% of leader.

new_strategy_ideas.name: Late-Day/Charm Pin Avoid Holdout
new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: Activated dormant profile must be independently positive, reduce combined pin/charm worst MAE, and retain >=97% total PnL.

new_strategy_ideas.name: Call Wall Acceptance Sample Builder
new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: At least 5 trades, positive profile PnL, average MAE better than -60, worst MAE better than -100, total PnL >=98% of leader.
